---
title: "spatial_transform_batched"
generated: true
description: "Map `spatial_transform` over a single leading batch axis."
---

[ã¿ back to `nitrix.geometry.grid`](../nitrix-geometry-grid.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:spatial_transform_batched -->
```python
spatial_transform_batched(image: Float[Array, '...'], deformation: Float[Array, '...'], *, mode: BoundaryMode = 'constant', cval: float = 0.0, method: Interpolator = Linear()) -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:spatial_transform_batched -->
Map `spatial_transform` over a single leading batch axis.

Convenience wrapper for the common case where the batch axis is
carried by only one operand: a batch of images warped by a
single shared deformation (or a single image under a batch of
deformations).  `spatial_transform` itself requires the
leading batch dims of `image` and `deformation` to match
exactly -- it deliberately does not broadcast -- so this case
otherwise needs an explicit `jax.vmap` with the right
`in_axes`.  This picks `in_axes` from whichever operand
carries the leading axis and saves the per-model wrapper line.

The batch axis is identified as a leading axis beyond the
`ndim + 1` "core" rank (`*spatial` plus the trailing
channel / `ndim` axis).  If both operands carry it, this maps
one axis and `spatial_transform` composes any further leading
dims natively.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:spatial_transform_batched -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `image` | `Float` | `...` | ã | `(*spatial, c)` or `(B, *spatial, c)`. |
| `deformation` | `Float` | `...` | ã | `(*spatial, ndim)` or `(B, *spatial, ndim)`. At least one of `image` / `deformation` must carry the leading batch axis. |
| `mode` | `BoundaryMode` | ã | `'constant'` | Forwarded to `spatial_transform`. |
| `cval` | `float` | ã | `0.0` | Forwarded to `spatial_transform`. |
| `method` | `Interpolator` | ã | `Linear()` | Forwarded to `spatial_transform`. |

**Returns** `Float` ã shape `...`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:spatial_transform_batched -->
::: {.callout-note}
Maps over exactly **one** leading axis.  To broadcast a shared
operand across *several* leading batch dims, broadcast it to the
full batch shape and call `spatial_transform` directly (which
handles multiple matching leading dims natively).
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:spatial_transform_batched -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
